seo.title: Sensitive Data Leakage Prevention in AI Agents in Google ADK Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix sensitive data leakage prevention in ai agents in Google ADK agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In Google ADK, sensitive data leakage in AI agents often occurs during multi-agent delegation where PII from one agent's session state is inadvertently shared across agents via shared tools or state handlers. Gemini model switching exacerbates this by inconsistent redaction in outputs, while tool response format mismatches can expose raw sensitive inputs. Session state corruption in long conversations further risks leaking accumulated user data across agent handoffs.

howItManifests.scenario: Multi-agent delegation shares unredacted session state
howItManifests.symptom: Downstream agents receive customer email/SSN from upstream agent tools
howItManifests.impact: Compliance violations (GDPR/CCPA) and account takeover risks

howItManifests.scenario: Gemini 1.5 Pro vs Flash model output inconsistency
howItManifests.symptom: Flash model fails to redact PII that Pro model masks
howItManifests.impact: Inconsistent data protection across deployment environments

howItManifests.scenario: Tool response format mismatches between agents
howItManifests.symptom: Raw user input passed as JSON payload to unauthorized tools
howItManifests.impact: Third-party tools receive unfiltered sensitive data

howItManifests.scenario: Session state corruption in long conversations
howItManifests.symptom: Historical PII accumulates and gets exposed in agent responses
howItManifests.impact: Complete conversation history leakage to end users

detection.name: PII Regex Scanner for Agent Outputs
detection.description: Scans all agent responses and tool outputs for common PII patterns before returning to user
detection.code:
import re

def detect_pii_leakage(agent_output: str) -> list:
    patterns = [
        r'\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b',
        r'\b\d{3}-?\d{2}-?\d{4}\b',
        r'\b\d{16}\b',
        r'\b[A-Z]{2}\d{6}\b'
    ]
    findings = []
    for pattern in patterns:
        matches = re.findall(pattern, agent_output)
        if matches:
            findings.extend(matches)
    return findings

# Usage in ADK
def before_agent_callback(event):
    output = event.get('output', '')
    pii = detect_pii_leakage(output)
    if pii:
        print(f'🚨 PII DETECTED: {pii}')
        event['block'] = True
    return event

vexAutomation.heading: Automating Sensitive Data Leakage Prevention in AI Agents Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates as a before_agent_callback in Google ADK to automatically scan every agent interaction for PII leakage patterns specific to multi-agent workflows. It detects session state corruption, tool input sanitization failures, and Gemini model inconsistencies in real-time, blocking risky operations before they propagate. Vex's remediation engine applies Presidio redaction, state partitioning, and agent-specific filters automatically, maintaining compliance across your entire agent fleet.

The platform provides comprehensive observability dashboards showing PII exposure trends by agent, tool, and conversation length, plus automated remediation workflows that evolve with your agent architecture. Vex handles ADK's unique challenges like circular delegation and state handoff vulnerabilities that traditional monitoring misses.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Add `pip install vex-sdk` and one callback to protect your entire ADK agent fleet from PII leakage today.
